author: lOrm
content: Fixed: load_entrypoint now returns anyhow::Result<Option<EntrypointFile>>; non-NotFound IO errors propagate with .context() naming the unreadable candidate. NotFound continues to the next candidate. Added unix-only test that chmods cwd MEMORY.md 000 with a readable home fallback and asserts the call Errs instead of silently loading the wrong file. Skipped under uid 0 since chmod 000 is a no-op for root.
